subject: english
learning_objectives: Apply sequence of tenses in writing

sections.heading: Definition
sections.content: Sequence of tenses ensures logical tense progression in sentences.

sections.heading: Sequence of Tenses
sections.content:
In 1982, PZ’s Managing Director Basil Sponddeas, who had spent his entire life working in the company, retired.
He was succeeded by George Loupos.

Where there is a choice of verbs in the above, select the appropriate one.
